dlg_elder_ramu.speaker: Elder Ramu
dlg_elder_ramu.text: Namaste, young one! Welcome to Peddapuram. I am Elder Ramu. We have lived peacefully here for generations, but dark times are upon us.

dlg_elder_ramu.speaker: Elder Ramu
dlg_elder_ramu.text: A criminal gang calling themselves the Redstone Gang has been seen near our villages. Crops are being stolen, and people are afraid to go out at night.

dlg_elder_ramu.speaker: Elder Ramu
dlg_elder_ramu.text: Nobody knows their faces yet. They strike at night and vanish into the forest. Even the police seem unable to catch them.

choices.label: I'll find out who they are.

dlg_elder_ramu.speaker: Elder Ramu
dlg_elder_ramu.text: If you're willing to help, start by introducing yourself to our village. Visit the Panchayat office and come back to me. Your first step as a village protector!

dlg_elder_ramu.speaker: Elder Ramu
dlg_elder_ramu.text: Peddapuram has our sacred temple, a fine school, a weekly market, and the best farm soil in the district. The lake to the west is full of fish. Come, explore!

dlg_teacher_lakshmi.speaker: Lakshmi Madam
dlg_teacher_lakshmi.text: Oh, a new face! Are you the farmer's child? I have heard about you. Education is the foundation of a good village. Will you attend my classes?

dlg_teacher_lakshmi.speaker: Lakshmi Madam
dlg_teacher_lakshmi.text: Mathematics, Telugu, science, and most importantly — how to be a responsible citizen. A good student makes a great village hero!

dlg_meena.speaker: Journalist Meena
dlg_meena.text: Ah, I have been waiting for someone trustworthy. I am Meena, investigative journalist for Vijayawada Daily. I've been tracking the Redstone Gang for six months.

dlg_meena.speaker: Journalist Meena
dlg_meena.text: A paper trail linking the gang's money to the local panchayat officer Krishnamurthy. But I need physical evidence — ledgers, photographs. That's where you come in.

choices.label: I'll help you get the evidence.

dlg_meena.speaker: Journalist Meena
dlg_meena.text: I know the risks. Two of my sources have already been threatened. But the truth must come out. Will you help me?

dlg_parvati.speaker: Parvati
dlg_parvati.text: (whispers) Oh! You startled me. Please, be quiet... those men might still be watching. I saw what happened on the night of the thefts.

choices.label: You are safe. I'll protect you.

dlg_parvati.speaker: Parvati
dlg_parvati.text: Three men with red bandanas. They came from the highway direction around 2 AM. They loaded our groundnut bags into a waiting truck. One of them I recognized — he buys chai at the town market!

choices.label: Can you come to the Panchayat?

dlg_parvati.speaker: Parvati
dlg_parvati.text: Thank you. My children are inside. Please find who did this. We lost everything we harvested this season.

choices.label: I promise. Tell me what you saw.

dlg_parvati.speaker: Parvati
dlg_parvati.text: No, no! They warned us not to go to the police. But... maybe the panchayat headman can help? Please be careful.

dlg_headman.speaker: Headman Venkat
dlg_headman.text: Namaste! As Panchayat headman, I urge all citizens to remain calm. The situation is being monitored. Now, what brings you here?

choices.label: I want to report a theft.
What's being done about the gang?

dlg_headman.speaker: Headman Venkat
dlg_headman.text: Three farms robbed this week! This is outrageous. If you can gather evidence, I will send a formal report to the district collector. Will you investigate?

choices.label: Let me gather more information first.

dlg_headman.speaker: Headman Venkat
dlg_headman.text: We've sent reports to the police, but they say there's insufficient evidence. We need someone to gather concrete proof. Are you up for this task?

dlg_priest.speaker: Priest Subramaniam
dlg_priest.text: Jay Venkateswara! May the Lord bless you, child. The temple is always open. Light a lamp, say a prayer. In these troubled times, divine grace is our strength.

choices.label: Has the gang threatened the temple?

dlg_priest.speaker: Priest Subramaniam
dlg_priest.text: Very good. A pure heart and brave action together are invincible. Receive this prasadam. (+5 HP restored)

dlg_priest.speaker: Priest Subramaniam
dlg_priest.text: Last week, two men came asking about the idol's gold coating. They left when I called for help. I fear they will return. The temple must be protected!

dlg_official.speaker: Officer Krishnamurthy
dlg_official.text: What do you want? I am a very busy government official. Everything in this district is perfectly under control. There is no crime problem.

choices.label: Three farms were robbed last night.
People say there is a gang here.

dlg_official.speaker: Officer Krishnamurthy
dlg_official.text: Rumours! Village gossip! Those farmers probably misplaced their own goods. I suggest you go home and stop asking questions. This is official business.

dlg_official.speaker: Officer Krishnamurthy
dlg_official.text: Gang? What gang? Do not spread such lies. Now get out of my office before I have you removed!

dlg_forest_officer.speaker: Forest Officer
dlg_forest_officer.text: Halt! These forest trails are restricted after sunset. Strange vehicle tracks have been found on the old logging road. You must be careful here.

dlg_forest_officer.speaker: Forest Officer
dlg_forest_officer.text: Ah, a brave young person. Two nights ago I heard engine sounds and saw torch lights near the old clearing. They scattered before I could reach them.

choices.label: Can you show me on a map?

dlg_forest_officer.speaker: Forest Officer
dlg_forest_officer.text: A leopard was spotted near the school path yesterday. I have filed a report, but the children need to be escorted home until the animal relocates.

dlg_forest_officer.speaker: Forest Officer
dlg_forest_officer.text: The clearing is three kilometres north, past the banyan grove. I marked it with a white stone. But go in daytime — it's too dangerous at night alone.

dlg_bus_driver.speaker: Bus Driver Raju
dlg_bus_driver.text: Arre! Want to go to town? My bus leaves at 8 AM and 2 PM. Costs twenty rupees. Fastest way between village and town!

choices.label: Take me back to the village.
How often does the bus run?

dlg_bus_driver.speaker: Bus Driver Raju
dlg_bus_driver.text: Hop in! Next stop — Rajahmundry Town Market! Hold tight, the highway is busy today.

dlg_bus_driver.speaker: Bus Driver Raju
dlg_bus_driver.text: Going back to the village? Good, dinner time soon! Twenty rupees please.

dlg_bus_driver.speaker: Bus Driver Raju
dlg_bus_driver.text: Morning at 8, afternoon at 2, evening at 6. Last bus at 9 PM. If you miss it — you walk! Ha ha!

dlg_generic_villager.speaker: Villager
dlg_generic_villager.text: Namaste! Life in Peddapuram is usually peaceful. These days, everyone is worried about the thefts. Please be safe, especially at night.

dlg_generic_villager.speaker: Villager
dlg_generic_villager.text: They say the gang has a hideout in the forest. My neighbour's cousin saw trucks going that way at midnight. Strange business!

dlg_generic_farmer.speaker: Farmer
dlg_generic_farmer.text: Hard work in the fields, fair rains from Lord Indra, and a good price at market. That's all a farmer asks for. What can I do for you?

dlg_generic_farmer.speaker: Farmer
dlg_generic_farmer.text: Always plow before planting. Water twice a day in summer. Watch for pests after rain — they come fast! Chilli and groundnut give the best prices in our market.

dlg_fisherman.speaker: Fisherman
dlg_fisherman.text: Ah, a visitor to our lake! The water is clear today and the fish are active. Have you tried fishing before?

dlg_fisherman.speaker: Fisherman
dlg_fisherman.text: Simple! Hold the cast button to power up, release to cast. When the bobber dips — that's a bite! Tap Attack quickly to hook it. Then hold Sprint to reel it in, keeping the bar in the green zone!

dlg_fisherman.speaker: Fisherman
dlg_fisherman.text: Ah, the legend! Old Krishnamala — a 20 kg catfish said to be 50 years old. Only appears at dawn, in the deep zone near the island. Many have tried. None have caught her!

dlg_fisherman.speaker: Fisherman
dlg_fisherman.text: This lake feeds three villages. Rohu, catla, tilapia, prawn — all fresh. The island in the centre has old ruins. They say treasure is buried there from the Zamindar's time!
